meaning: adj.紧凑的,紧密的,简洁的n.契约,合同,小粉盒
examples: Their bodies are sleek and compact.
It was a compact fluorescent light bulb.
It was indeed very compact and comfortable.
Boston is a compact city, which makes it easy to get around on foot.
Corktown, one of the city's oldest neighbourhoods, is perhaps the most compact example of Detroit's artistic rebirth.
